track.name: Entertainment & Nightlife
track.question: Is nightlife truly walkable for residents, or designed for destination travel? Map the transit-nightlife coverage gap.

scoring.composite: 0.6 * walk/bike baseline mean + 0.4 * walk/bike/transit track mean
scoring.note: Mode-specific scores are shown for comparison; car is not used in the main 15MC score.

data_sources.name: Gaode/Amap POI shapefiles, Shanghai 2023
data_sources.used_for: POI categories, district names, coordinates, and collection timestamps.
data_sources.limitations: Point POI data only; no real network travel time, opening hours, or rating fields.

data_sources.name: Derived 500 m analysis grid
data_sources.used_for: Spatial sampling frame for 15-minute proximity scoring.
data_sources.limitations: Grid is generated from POI extent rather than a municipal boundary polygon.

data_sources.name: Derived 15-minute mode buffers
data_sources.used_for: Walk, bike, transit, and car accessibility proxies using mode-specific radii.
data_sources.limitations: Euclidean buffers approximate isochrones because no routing API key is included.

data_sources.name: Uber H3 indexing
data_sources.used_for: Resolution-8 hex aggregation for the web map.
data_sources.limitations: Aggregation uses grid centroids and mean scores within each H3 cell.

limitations: Euclidean buffers are used as reproducible proxies for 15-minute isochrones because no routing API key was provided.
Late-night transit is proxied by metro/transit POI access; timetable data should replace this in a production submission.
Rent band is a district-level proxy for the required detail panel field, not a listing-derived rent model.
Gaode/Amap POIs may contain duplicates, closed venues, and inconsistent category tags.
